author: Cp0204
description:
Portainer Community Edition (CE) is a lightweight container management tool offering an intuitive Web interface to simplify building, managing, and monitoring containerized applications. With over 500,000 active users, it is widely appreciated for its ease of use and robust functionality, ideal for individual developers, home lab users, and small teams.

The tool's core features include multi-platform support, resource management, and real-time monitoring. It supports managing various container platforms, covering containers, images, volumes, and networks. Users can quickly create, deploy, and manage containers via a “smart” graphical interface or comprehensive API, without needing deep command-line expertise. It provides real-time container status monitoring, log viewing, and configuration management, ensuring efficient control over application operations.

Its design philosophy is to “simplify container complexity” with an intuitive interface and default settings that lower the technical barrier. Users can manage containerized applications without complex configurations, saving time and boosting efficiency. It is completely free, with data stored locally, ensuring full user control. Community support via GitHub Discussions and Slack, along with rich documentation and regular updates, enhances the user experience, making it suitable for learning container technology or managing small projects.

**Key Features:**
- Intuitive Web interface for simplified containerized app management
- Supports multiple container platforms for unified resource management
- Real-time monitoring of container status and logs
- Rapid container deployment and management via API
- Community support with extensive documentation and assistance

**Learn More:**
- [Portainer Official Website](https://www.portainer.io/)
- [Portainer GitHub Repository](https://github.com/portainer/portainer)

releaseNotes.en_US:
- 2.31.3 adds the --trusted-origins CLI option and TRUSTED_ORIGINS environment variable.
- The option is used to configure allowed domains when Portainer is behind a reverse proxy and avoids Origin invalid errors.
- The release documents known limitations for Podman support.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- 2.31.3 adds the --trusted-origins CLI option and TRUSTED_ORIGINS environment variable.
- The option is used to configure allowed domains when Portainer is behind a reverse proxy and avoids Origin invalid errors.
- The release documents known limitations for Podman support.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- 2.31.3 aggiunge l'opzione --trusted-origins CLI e la variabile di ambiente TRUSTED_ORIGINS.
- L'opzione viene utilizzata per configurare i domini consentiti quando Portainer si trova dietro un proxy inverso ed evita errori di Origin non validi.
- La versione documenta le limitazioni note per il supporto Podman.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- 2.31.3 legger til --trusted-origins CLI alternativet og TRUSTED_ORIGINS miljøvariabelen.
- Alternativet brukes til å konfigurere tillatte domener når Portainer står bak en omvendt proxy og unngår Origin ugyldige feil.
- Utgivelsen dokumenterer kjente begrensninger for Podman-støtte.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:
- 2.31.3 增加了 --trusted-origins CLI option 和 TRUSTED_ORIGINS environment variable。
- 该选项用于在 Portainer 位于 reverse proxy 后方时配置允许的 domains，并避免 Origin invalid errors。
- 此版本记录了 Podman support 的已知限制。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- 2.31.3 は --trusted-origins CLI option と TRUSTED_ORIGINS environment variable を追加します。
- このオプションは Portainer が reverse proxy の背後にある場合に許可 domains を設定し、Origin invalid errors を回避します。
- このリリースでは Podman support の既知の制限が文書化されています。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- 2.31.3은 --trusted-origins CLI option과 TRUSTED_ORIGINS environment variable을 추가합니다.
- 이 옵션은 Portainer가 reverse proxy 뒤에 있을 때 허용된 domains를 구성하고 Origin invalid errors를 방지하는 데 사용됩니다.
- 이 릴리스는 Podman support의 알려진 제한 사항을 문서화합니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- 2.31.3 ajoute --trusted-origins CLI option et TRUSTED_ORIGINS environment variable.
- Cette option configure les domains autorises lorsque Portainer est derriere un reverse proxy et evite les Origin invalid errors.
- Cette version documente les limitations connues de Podman support.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- 2.31.3 fuegt die --trusted-origins CLI option und die TRUSTED_ORIGINS environment variable hinzu.
- Die Option konfiguriert erlaubte Domains, wenn Portainer hinter einem reverse proxy liegt, und vermeidet Origin invalid errors.
- Das Release dokumentiert bekannte Einschraenkungen fuer Podman support.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- 2.31.3 lägger till alternativet --trusted-origins CLI och miljövariabeln TRUSTED_ORIGINS.
- Alternativet används för att konfigurera tillåtna domäner när Portainer ligger bakom en omvänd proxy och undviker felaktiga Origin ogiltiga fel.
- Releasen dokumenterar kända begränsningar för Podman-support.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- Ο 2.31.3 προσθέτει την επιλογή --trusted-origins CLI και τη μεταβλητή περιβάλλοντος TRUSTED_ORIGINS.
- Η επιλογή χρησιμοποιείται για τη διαμόρφωση των επιτρεπόμενων τομέων όταν το Portainer βρίσκεται πίσω από έναν αντίστροφο διακομιστή μεσολάβησης και αποφεύγει τα μη έγκυρα σφάλματα προέλευσης.
- Η έκδοση τεκμηριώνει τους γνωστούς περιορισμούς για την υποστήριξη του Podman.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:
- 2.31.3 dodaje opciju --trusted-origins CLI i TRUSTED_ORIGINS varijablu okruženja.
- Opcija se koristi za konfiguriranje dopuštenih domena kada je Portainer iza obrnutog proxyja i izbjegava nevažeće pogreške podrijetla.
- Izdanje dokumentira poznata ograničenja za Podman podršku.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- 2.31.3 adiciona a opção --trusted-origins CLI e a variável de ambiente TRUSTED_ORIGINS.
- A opção é utilizada para configurar domínios permitidos quando o Portainer está atrás de um proxy reverso e evita erros Origin inválidos.
- O lançamento documenta limitações conhecidas para o suporte do Podman.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- 2.31.3 добавляет параметр --trusted-origins CLI и переменную среды TRUSTED_ORIGINS.
- Эта опция используется для настройки разрешенных доменов, когда Portainer находится за обратным прокси-сервером, и позволяет избежать недопустимых ошибок Origin.
- В релизе документированы известные ограничения поддержки Podman.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:
- 2.31.3 --trusted-origins CLI seçeneğini ve TRUSTED_ORIGINS ortam değişkenini ekler.
- Bu seçenek, Portainer bir ters proxy arkasında olduğunda ve Origin geçersiz hatalarını önlediğinde izin verilen etki alanlarını yapılandırmak için kullanılır.
- Sürüm, Podman desteğine ilişkin bilinen sınırlamaları belgeliyor.

title: Portainer
